title: Pickpocket
body:
Open other players' inventories simply by shift+right clicking them.

![One player with their inventory open normally and another player opening the first player's inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BreIxLmo/images/2ab5e76e9b2114d260058bb4d742de7878e561c1.png)

---

Works server-only, although installing on the client correctly plays a first-person hand animation and prevents edge cases like clicking with a usable item.
